name: Carrot Soup
recipeIngredient: Fresh dill sprigs (optional) or a sprinkling of dried dillweed
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 4-quart saucepan, combine carrots, onion, and vegetable broth. Cover and bring to a boil over high heat.
2. Reduce heat to low and simmer until carrots are tender, about 15 minutes.
3. Remove the saucepan from heat, uncover, and let cool for 10 minutes. If desired, set aside about 8 carrot slices for garnish.
4. Pour the cooled carrot mixture into an electric blender or food processor fitted with a chopping blade. Cover and blend on low or pulse on high until finely chopped.
5. Increase speed to medium and continue blending or processing until smooth. Stir in the cheese and cover, then blend or process on medium to high speed until smooth.
6. Pour the soup into bowls and garnish with carrot slices and dill, if desired.
107 calories per cup.
